comment: The on_fill door (DESIGN_QUESTS §4/§6): a hook overrides the data-ranked fill, and reads its own latched binding. reed and wren both pass require and there is no prefer, so the data rank is [reed, wren] (id sort) — the pick would be reed. probe_roles.on_fill returns the LAST candidate (wren), a choice the data alone would never make, so hauler=wren can only mean on_fill fired. on_start then writes q.role('hauler') to a test key, proving a hook reads the REAL binding (not the pre-Q4 empty string) because on_start runs after the roles seal.
